description: The chat UI is served from the user's OWN Zenithar host — a remote origin — and Tauri denies remote pages IPC by default. Grant that remote page exactly ONE command: opener open-url, so links tapped in messages open in the system browser instead of navigating the webview. Scoped to open-url only; no other IPC is exposed to remote content. Hosts are arbitrary (self-hosted, multi-host), so the URL patterns are wildcards over any http(s) host/port/path.
